mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_FACTEXPRESS (C_FACT_CODE, C_RULE_RANGE, L_EXEC_ORDER, C_EXPRESS_TYPE, C_ENTITY_CODE, VC_AGGRE_FUNC, VC_IMP_FUNC, C_IS_DIMEN_INS, VC_COMPLEX_EXPR, VC_ENTITY, VC_GET_COLUMNS, VC_FACT_COL, VC_OUTDETAIL_COLS, VC_OUTSUM_COLS, VC_OUTGROUP_COLS, VC_DETAIL_GROUP) values (#{cFactCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cRuleRange,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lExecOrder,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cExpressType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cEntityCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcAggreFunc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcImpFunc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cIsDimenIns,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcComplexExpr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcEntity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGetColumns,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFactCol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutdetailCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutsumCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutgroupCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDetailGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select C_FACT_CODE, C_RULE_RANGE, L_EXEC_ORDER, C_EXPRESS_TYPE, C_ENTITY_CODE, VC_AGGRE_FUNC, VC_IMP_FUNC, C_IS_DIMEN_INS, VC_COMPLEX_EXPR, VC_ENTITY, VC_GET_COLUMNS, VC_FACT_COL, VC_OUTDETAIL_COLS, VC_OUTSUM_COLS, VC_OUTGROUP_COLS, VC_DETAIL_GROUP from T_COMP_FACTEXPRESS
